project.name: Pro Hunter Agent
project.duplicate_copy: /home/t0n34781/projects/badgr_harness/pro_hunter — stale, not maintained, do not use

build_focus.primary_goal: AI-assisted job search and application system: scrape job postings from multiple sources, score against skill profiles using local LLMs, track in CSV CRM, automate form filling, and integrate with badgr_harness via MCP and RAG.
secondary_goals: Local-first LLM usage — Ollama models handle all parsing, scoring, and browser automation. Cloud models are last-resort fallback only.
Tiered scraping fallback to handle anti-bot protections without relying on expensive cloud scrapers by default.
Seamless integration with badgr_harness: jobs indexed into ChromaDB job_opportunities collection; MCP server exposes job tools to Claude.
Production-ready: proper Python package structure, config-driven, cron-schedulable, fully logged.

environment.hardware: AMD Ryzen 5 5500, 16GB RAM, AMD RX 6500 XT

scrapers.purpose: Multi-tiered web scraping with automatic fallback. Tier order: local -> firecrawl_self_hosted -> firecrawl_cloud -> browseruse -> agenty.

parsers.purpose: LLM-based extraction of job fields from raw HTML/markdown. Regex fallback when LLM unavailable.

llm.purpose: Local Ollama client wrapper, cloud fallback, fit scoring against skill profiles, resume and cover letter generation.

pipeline.purpose: End-to-end orchestration. runner.py is the main pipeline. collector.py builds search URLs. scheduler.py is cron-ready daily runner.

storage.purpose: 50-field CRM CSV with dedup-by-job_id and workflow status tracking.

cli.purpose: CLI commands: collect-score, apply, query, list, run-daily.

files.sites.yaml: 7 job sites with per-site scraping strategy tiers
files.providers.yaml: API keys (env var refs), Ollama config, scraping tier order, call quotas
files.skills.yaml: 8 skill profiles: python-automation, ai-systems, federal-contracts, web-dev, ai-agents, devops-mlops, content-tech, data-engineering
files.identity.yaml: Brandon Anthony Grant / BADGRTechnologies LLC / UEI U9GUGKVFGCA9 — CAGE code is placeholder

integration_modules.mcp_server.py: MCP stdio server. Tools: job_search, job_query, job_apply, list_jobs, ingest_jobs_to_rag.
integration_modules.rag_bridge.py: Feeds jobs into badgr_harness ChromaDB at rag_db/. Collection: job_opportunities. Separate from badgr_corpus.
integration_modules.form_filler.py: Browser form automation using BrowserUse + langchain-ollama. Always dry-run by default.

badgr_harness_integration.note: job_opportunities is a separate ChromaDB collection from badgr_corpus. Do not merge. Different metadata schemas.

worker_delegation_pattern.claude: Architecture decisions, import/dependency correctness, integration logic, final verification
worker_delegation_pattern.qwen2.5-coder:7b: Code boilerplate, config YAML generation, test templates
worker_delegation_pattern.qwen2.5:14b: Job scoring, job parsing, resume customization, complex reasoning
worker_delegation_pattern.mistral:7b: Documentation prose, RAG content, skill profile content (review output — tends to be generic)

current_state.venv_status: created — pip install and playwright install required before first run
current_state.first_live_run_status: not yet executed — URL typo in first test (remmoteok.com instead of remoteok.com)

known_issues.description: First test run used URL 'remmoteok.com' (double m). DNS resolution failed as expected. Not a bug.
identity.yaml CAGE code is placeholder string 'YOUR_CAGE'.
known_issues.resolution: Update config/identity.yaml cage_code field when CAGE code is obtained.

known_issues.description: providers.yaml API keys use ${VAR_NAME} placeholders for Firecrawl and Agenty. These tiers will fail without real keys.
known_issues.resolution: Set FIRECRAWL_API_KEY and AGENTY_API_KEY env vars, or edit providers.yaml directly. Tier 0 (local Playwright) works without any keys.

known_issues.description: Firecrawl self-hosted at localhost:3002 not yet deployed.
known_issues.resolution: Run Firecrawl via Docker: docker run -p 3002:3002 ghcr.io/mendableai/firecrawl

known_issues.description: badgr_harness/.claude/settings.local.json is root-owned. Cannot write project-level settings there.
known_issues.resolution: MCP registration handled via .mcp.json at badgr_harness root instead. This is the correct approach.
